name: Project.Feature.NodeConfigurator.NodeValidationColorCoding
observations: Implemented visual validation system for node configuration using color coding: green for complete nodes, red for incomplete nodes.
Complete nodes have name, IP address, at least one type, and tokens (if FBC/RPC types selected).
Colors update in real-time as user edits node properties via apply_current_changes method.

name: Project.Method.NodeConfigurator.ValidateNode
observations: Validation method that checks node completeness: name (required), IP (required), types (required), tokens (required for FBC/RPC).
Returns boolean indicating whether node has all required information for operation.
Used by populate_node_list and apply_current_changes to determine node color.

name: Project.Feature.NodeConfigurator.StandaloneTokenSysMatching
observations: Enhanced load_sys_file to support standalone tokenid.sys file loading that matches existing nodes by token ID.
When only token files selected (no main sys files), searches existing nodes for matching tokens and updates IP addresses.
Provides user feedback via dialog: success message with count, or no-matches warning with guidance.
